evals.prompt: Create status slides for order-platform from this week's team-status page.
evals.expected_output: scripts/build_slides.py runs against wiki/projects/order-platform/status/{date}-team-status.md with --theme default --audience leadership; produces outputs/{date}-order-platform-status.pptx with 7 canonical slides (title, exec summary, RAG dashboard, top risks, open issues, asks, what's next). Frontmatter `deck:` link added to the source page; changelog appended.

evals.prompt: Build the steering committee deck from <wikilink to team-status>.
evals.expected_output: Same script invocation with --audience steering-committee. Risks/Issues capped at 5 per slide; Asks slide emphasized. Output saved under outputs/ with the proposed name. Surfaces a 'review before sharing' reminder, including verifying RAG colors and Asks slide language.

evals.prompt: Generate slides from this status page for a customer audience: <path>.
evals.expected_output: Script run with --audience customer: Issues slide dropped; Risks reframed as 'watch items'. If the source contains internal-only language flagged for that audience, the skill flags for review BEFORE generating. Output is a customer-safe deck.
